reasoning: AICO (Autoridades Indígenas de Colombia) is an indigenous political party that primarily competes for the 2 seats reserved for indigenous constituencies in the 108-seat Colombian Senate. The major parties, such as Pacto Histórico, the Conservative Party, the Liberal Party, and Centro Democrático, typically win between 10 and 20 seats from the 100-seat national constituency. AICO has no national political infrastructure to field candidates and compete for a plurality of the overall Senate seats. Given this electoral structure and historical voting patterns, it is functionally impossible for AICO to win the most seats in the Senate.
batch_queries: Will AICO win the most seats in the 2026 Colombian Senate election?
